value.found_quote:
## Customize fallback filenames

If your repository already uses a different filename (for example `TEAM_GUIDE.md`), add it to the fallback list so Codex treats it like an instructions file.
value.rationale: The page contains a dedicated "Customize fallback filenames" section describing how to add alternate filenames to the fallback list (via project_doc_fallback_filenames) so Codex treats them as instruction files, exactly matching the claim. No lifecycle caveats are present, so it is described as active.
